head: Online Platform for Managing Powerlifting Competitions
lineOne: This project is built to manage powerlifting competitions. It enables full control over athlete attempts,
lineTwo: weight selection, and real-time result display. The interface is optimized for use on the competition platform.
access: 🔒 Access is restricted to authorized users only. 📩 Please contact us to request access or technical support: 📧 powerlift.rv@gmail.com
